scripts.lint: npm run mobile:lint && npm run api:lint
scripts.build: npm run api:build && npm run mobile:typecheck
scripts.test: npm run check:repository && npm run mobile:test && npm run api:test
scripts.audit:production: npm run mobile:audit:production && npm run api:audit:production
scripts.check:repository: npm run check:no-test-shortcuts && npm run check:env-safety && npm run check:package-locks && npm run check:test-suites && npm run check:migrations && npm run check:repo-integrity
scripts.verify: npm run check:repository && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run mobile:test && npm run api:test
